# Feature branches replayed (in order) onto upstream/main to build `develop`.
# One entry per in-flight upstream PR. The sync-and-rebuild-develop workflow
# rebases each onto fresh upstream/main and fast-forwards it into develop.
#
# Lifecycle:
#   - add a line when you open a new feature/<slug> branch + upstream PR
#   - remove the line once that PR merges (the change is then in upstream/main)
#   - revise the branch (or remove it) if the PR is rejected
#
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.

feature/speaker-coordinator-probe
feature/bedtime-schedule-write
